# Contributing

## Development Setup
1. Build: make.
2. Run tests: make test.
3. Style check: make lint-style.

## Pull Requests
1. Keep changes focused and small.
2. Add or update tests for behavior changes.
3. Ensure CI is green before requesting review.

## Commit Guidance
1. Use clear, imperative commit messages.
2. Separate refactors from behavior changes when possible.
